rules.description: Maintain current indentation after semicolon at end of statement
Reduce indentation when closing a block with }
Increase indentation on newline after an opening brace
Auto-indent closing HTML/template tags to match their opening tag
Insert newline and maintain indentation after decorator before class/method declaration
Align continuation of pipe expressions in templates with the pipe operator
Indent template interpolation expressions and bindings continued on a new line
Align array and object literal entries with the opening bracket or brace
